category_sources: Official reference describes the Zero language syntax, program model, types, control flow, packages, stdlib, and tooling.
source_facts.description says Zerolang is a programming language for agents with explicit effects and predictable memory.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the project name zerolang.
source_facts.name is zerolang and source_facts.homepage is zerolang.ai.
docs_sources: Official zerolang.ai reference and standard library pages provide dedicated documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official reference documents language syntax, packages, stdlib, and tooling.
